title: OHO ALJ Disposition Data by Judge, FY2025 YTD (latest-vintage)
description: Per-Administrative-Law-Judge hearing-stage disposition data for FY2025 YTD: 1,439 individual ALJs with their owning hearing office, total dispositions, dispositions across all offices, decisions, awards, denials, and fully/partially favorable counts. Extracted from SSA OHO's published '03_ALJ_Disposition_Data' report.

columns.name: Total Dispositions
columns.description: Disposition count at the ALJ's primary office (DSPN_CNT).

columns.name: Total ALJ Dispositions Across All Offices
columns.description: Disposition count across all offices the ALJ heard cases at.

columns.name: Decisions
columns.description: Decision count = Awards + Denials (excludes dismissals; DCN_CNT).

columns.name: Awards
columns.description: Total awards = Fully Favorable + Partially Favorable (TOTAW).

geographic_coverage: United States (ALJs across hearing offices nationwide)
notes: Authoritative: official OHO published statistics (extracted from the published report to CSV by scripts/extract-oho-alj-table.js; values are SSA's, not recomputed). Period is FY2025 YTD (09/28/2024–09/26/2025), hence temporal_coverage 2024–2025. This '-LATEST' file has NO dated sibling in the directory (sole copy) and follows the LATEST naming convention; OHO publishes monthly archives back to FY2011. Some ALJs have very low caseloads — filter Decisions >= 50 for stable allowance-rate comparisons. Upstream raw capture: 03-alj-disposition.tables.json; field definitions: FIELD_DEFINITIONS.txt.
